result:
Here is the complete list of agents and skills available for the Agent tool:

- Claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed.
- Explore: Read-only search agent for broad fan-out searches — when the user wants a broad fan-out search — when the user wants a general-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks.
- plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task.
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting.
- fleet-resilience: Build or extend a deterministic resilience layer over a fleet of long-running autonomous agents/sessions/workers — detect what stopped and WHY, classify on hard signals (not text), auto-recover safely (resume-once, honor done/user-closed, defer infra), make recovery survive the launcher (OS-level watchdog / PID-1), and record + notify everything.
- plan-audit: Audit a Claude Code skill's per-invocation context use,
